metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for modern full-stack development with LLM performance tracking and E2E skill testing

plugins.name: code-analysis
plugins.description: Deep code investigation with mnemex MCP server. v5.0.1: Renamed mnemex CLI tool.

plugins.name: multimodel
plugins.description: Multi-model collaboration, orchestration, and workflow patterns. v2.8.1: Added claudish-usage skill (moved from code-analysis).

plugins.name: agentdev
plugins.description: Create, implement, and review Claude Code agents and commands with multi-model validation, LLM performance tracking, and session-based artifact isolation. v1.5.5: Command and documentation fixes.

plugins.name: seo
plugins.description: Highly autonomous SEO toolkit (~80% autonomy) with AUTO GATEs, self-correction loops, and multi-model validation. v1.6.5: Command parameter fixes.

plugins.name: video-editing
plugins.description: Professional video editing toolkit with FFmpeg operations, Whisper transcription, and Apple Final Cut Pro project generation. v1.1.1: Marketplace rename to magus. Features intelligent video analysis, automated transcription with timing sync, FCPXML timeline creation.

plugins.name: nanobanana
plugins.description: AI image generation and editing using Google Gemini 3 Pro Image API. v2.3.1: Marketplace rename to magus. Simple Node.js CLI with markdown styles and batch generation.

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Context-Driven Development workflow inspired by Gemini Conductor. v2.1.1: Marketplace rename to magus. Full-featured implementation with TDD workflow, Phase Completion Protocol, Git Notes audit trail, and comprehensive styleguides.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Universal development assistant. v2.4.0: /dev:audit command, value banners, improved help with 12 commands in 4 workflow groups.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Adaptive statusline — always-visible bars, background highlights for critical states, provider-aware model display, vim mode, diff stats, compaction count. v2.0.3: Show 1M/1.5M/2M for large context windows instead of 1000k.

plugins.name: browser-use
plugins.description: Full-platform browser automation for Claude Code. v1.0.1: Fix macOS dock icon (Python rocket) for MCP server. 18 MCP tools, 5 skills, local CDP + Cloud support.

plugins.name: designer
plugins.description: UI design validation with pixel-diff comparison engine. v0.2.0: Design review agent, visual comparison, style guide creation, browser-use optional integration. 6 skills.

plugins.name: terminal
plugins.description: Interactive terminal integration for Claude Code. v3.0.1: fix pane detection race condition — use $TMUX_PANE instead of display-message -p (immune to focus changes during subagent delay), fix E2E test runner. 5 skills, 9 commands, 1 agent.

plugins.name: gtd
plugins.description: GTD (Getting Things Done) workflow integration. v2.0.0: Canonical GTD terminology (Clarify, Engage), sequential task IDs (#1, #2), boxed terminal display, reference list, Bun display tool. Real-time sync via hooks, 7 commands, 2 skills.
